message:
test: add TLS conformance tests and fix test infrastructure

tls_conformance.rs: Add two new TLS tests — zero_length_read_returns
_immediately and close_notify_causes_peer_eof_read — validating edge
cases in the TLS stream implementation.

io_e2e.rs: After IO cancel, call task_completed() to let the region
fully close and be reclaimed from the arena. Check for None (reclaimed)
in addition to Closed state.

io_cancellation.rs: Explicitly remove the task from the region after
completing it. Adjust assertion from checking individual fields after
cancel to verifying the region was fully reclaimed.

docs/integration.md: Update examples to use real return values instead
of todo!() and unimplemented!() placeholders.

scripts/run_all_e2e.sh: Fix bash associative array access syntax from
$RESULTS[$name] to ${RESULTS[$name]}.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -673,7 +673,7 @@ for name in "${SUITE_ORDER[@]}"; do
     if [[ "$summary_schema_ok" -eq 0 ]]; then
         contract_violation=1
     fi
-    if [[ "$RESULTS[$name]" == "FAIL" || "$RESULTS[$name]" == "TIMEOUT" ]]; then
+    if [[ "${RESULTS[$name]}" == "FAIL" || "${RESULTS[$name]}" == "TIMEOUT" ]]; then
         if [[ "$replay_verified" -eq 0 || "$artifact_complete" -eq 0 ]]; then
             contract_violation=1
         fi
